text.text: Selenic components now generate naturally in the world. If you find them in ruins, moonlit ground, or other unusual places, do not be surprised: the Astrolabe often precedes those who would write about it.
Ruins of the Lunar Astrolabe can occasionally be found high in the mountains. After all, astrology calls for thin air and a height closer to the moon and stars.

Naturally generated components may be used as a starting point, moved elsewhere, or completed into a working structure. Generation does not guarantee that every recipe condition is already satisfied; lunar phase, height, inputs, fluids, and testimonies are still checked by the recipe.
